nodes.name: MarketCollectorApplication.java
nodes.summary: Spring Boot entry point for the market collector service, enabling AppConf configuration properties before bootstrapping the application context.
nodes.languageNotes: Spring annotations and Lombok reduce boilerplate while keeping dependency injection and configuration binding explicit.

nodes.name: MarketCollectorApplication
nodes.summary: Application bootstrap class for the market collector Spring Boot service.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Starts the Spring Boot market collector application with AppConf properties enabled.

nodes.name: TokenClient.java
nodes.summary: HTTP client component that authenticates against the configured data-feed API and retrieves investor identifiers for MQTT websocket login.
nodes.languageNotes: Spring annotations and Lombok reduce boilerplate while keeping dependency injection and configuration binding explicit.

nodes.name: TokenClient
nodes.summary: Spring component that exchanges configured data-feed credentials for access token and investor identity values.

nodes.name: getToken
nodes.summary: Builds a credential request, calls the configured token endpoint, and extracts the returned bearer token.

nodes.name: getInvestorId
nodes.summary: Calls the configured investor endpoint with a bearer token and returns the investorId field from the response.

nodes.name: AppConf.java
nodes.summary: Typed Spring configuration properties for cluster, Kafka, MQTT, data-feed, and database settings, with startup logging of the resolved configuration.
nodes.languageNotes: Spring annotations and Lombok reduce boilerplate while keeping dependency injection and configuration binding explicit.

nodes.name: AppConf
nodes.summary: Configuration properties holder for runtime integration settings used by the collector.

nodes.name: logConfig
nodes.summary: Logs resolved cluster, Kafka, MQTT, data-feed, and database configuration values after property binding.

nodes.name: KafkaService.java
nodes.summary: Reusable Kafka service that manages producer and consumer lifecycle, topic publishing, consumer polling, shutdown, and message envelope serialization.
nodes.languageNotes: Spring annotations and Lombok reduce boilerplate while keeping dependency injection and configuration binding explicit.

nodes.name: KafkaService
nodes.summary: Shared Kafka messaging base class that owns producer, consumer, serialization, and shutdown behavior.

nodes.name: connectProducer
nodes.summary: Creates or replaces the Kafka producer using configured bootstrap servers, client id, group id, and string serializers.

nodes.name: createDefaultTopic
nodes.summary: Stores the default Kafka topic used by convenience send operations.

nodes.name: send
nodes.summary: Publishes payloads to Kafka with generated keys and callback error logging.

nodes.name: startConsumer
nodes.summary: Creates a Kafka consumer, subscribes to topics, and runs a polling loop on a dedicated thread.

nodes.name: subscribe
nodes.summary: Replaces the active Kafka consumer subscription with a single topic.

nodes.name: shutdown
nodes.summary: Stops consumer polling, wakes and joins the consumer thread, then flushes and closes the producer.

nodes.name: toJson
nodes.summary: Wraps a raw payload in a Message envelope and serializes it to JSON.

nodes.name: MqttListener.java
nodes.summary: Spring service that connects to the market data MQTT websocket, subscribes to all stock symbols from the database, converts incoming ticks to Stock payloads, and republishes them to Kafka and MQTT producers.
nodes.languageNotes: Spring annotations and Lombok reduce boilerplate while keeping dependency injection and configuration binding explicit.

nodes.name: MqttListener
nodes.summary: MQTT market data listener that subscribes to stock quote topics and forwards parsed updates.

nodes.name: init
nodes.summary: Initializes the listener connection after Spring constructs the service.

nodes.name: initConnection
nodes.summary: Fetches stock ids and data-feed credentials, connects to the websocket broker, and subscribes to each stock quote topic.

nodes.name: connectionLost
nodes.summary: Reconnects the market data listener after MQTT connection loss.

nodes.name: handleIncomingMessage
nodes.summary: Parses an incoming quote message into a Stock payload and forwards it to Kafka and MQTT producers.

nodes.name: Message.java
nodes.summary: Lombok-backed message envelope model carrying source, event, URI, timestamp, and payload fields for Kafka publication.
nodes.languageNotes: Spring annotations and Lombok reduce boilerplate while keeping dependency injection and configuration binding explicit.

nodes.name: Message
nodes.summary: Message envelope value object serialized before publishing to Kafka.

nodes.name: Stock.java
nodes.summary: Simple market tick model containing stock identifier and matched price fields used when forwarding live price updates.
nodes.languageNotes: Spring annotations and Lombok reduce boilerplate while keeping dependency injection and configuration binding explicit.

nodes.name: Stock
nodes.summary: Value object for a stock symbol and current matched price.

nodes.name: MqttService.java
nodes.summary: Base MQTT service built on Eclipse Paho that handles authenticated TLS-capable connections, publish/subscribe operations, callbacks, and asynchronous message dispatch.
nodes.languageNotes: Spring annotations and Lombok reduce boilerplate while keeping dependency injection and configuration binding explicit.

nodes.name: MqttService
nodes.summary: Reusable MQTT callback service for connections, publishing, subscriptions, and async incoming-message handling.

nodes.name: connect
nodes.summary: Creates a Paho MQTT client, configures reconnect, TLS and credentials, then opens the broker connection.

nodes.name: disconnect
nodes.summary: Disconnects the active MQTT client and records the disconnected state.

nodes.name: createDefaultTopic
nodes.summary: Stores the default MQTT topic used by convenience send operations.

nodes.name: send
nodes.summary: Publishes payload bytes to an MQTT topic when the client is connected.

nodes.name: subscribe
nodes.summary: Subscribes the connected MQTT client to a topic with error logging.

nodes.name: connectionLost
nodes.summary: Marks the MQTT service disconnected and logs callback failures from Paho.

nodes.name: messageArrived
nodes.summary: Converts an incoming MQTT message to text and dispatches handling on a new thread.

nodes.name: deliveryComplete
nodes.summary: Paho delivery completion callback implemented as a no-op.

nodes.name: KafkaProducer.java
nodes.summary: Spring Kafka producer wrapper that initializes the shared KafkaService with configured topics and publishes stock update payloads as message envelopes.
nodes.languageNotes: Spring annotations and Lombok reduce boilerplate while keeping dependency injection and configuration binding explicit.

nodes.name: KafkaProducer
nodes.summary: Concrete stock update producer backed by the shared Kafka service.

nodes.name: init
nodes.summary: Initializes the default Kafka topic and connects the producer after Spring construction.

nodes.name: publish
nodes.summary: Serializes a stock update message envelope and sends it to Kafka.

nodes.name: MqttProducer.java
nodes.summary: Spring MQTT producer wrapper that initializes a configured outbound MQTT connection and publishes stock update payloads to default or explicit topics.
nodes.languageNotes: Spring annotations and Lombok reduce boilerplate while keeping dependency injection and configuration binding explicit.

nodes.name: MqttProducer
nodes.summary: Concrete stock update producer backed by the shared MQTT service.

nodes.name: init
nodes.summary: Initializes the outbound MQTT producer after Spring construction.

nodes.name: initConnection
nodes.summary: Creates the default outbound MQTT topic and connects with configured broker credentials.

nodes.name: connectionLost
nodes.summary: Reconnects the outbound MQTT producer after connection loss.

nodes.name: publish
nodes.summary: Publishes stock update payloads to the configured or supplied MQTT topic.

nodes.name: StockIdRepository.java
nodes.summary: JdbcTemplate repository that reads the configured stock universe from the stock_entity table for MQTT subscription setup.
nodes.languageNotes: Spring annotations and Lombok reduce boilerplate while keeping dependency injection and configuration binding explicit.

nodes.name: StockIdRepository
nodes.summary: Repository class that queries stock identifiers for subscription fan-out.

nodes.name: getAllStockIds
nodes.summary: Queries stock_entity for all stock_id values used to build live quote subscriptions.
